<!-- source-snippet repo="cn-quickstart" path="sdk/docs/sharable/sdk/quickstart/operate/json-api.rst" commit="5327209dd3223f985ed91803787e3b18c8ad77cb" snippet="cn-quickstart-rst-code-sdk-docs-sharable-sdk-quickstart-operate-json-api-bash-132" location="lines:132-138" -->
```bash
   export USER_ADMIN_TOKEN=$(curl -fsS "http://keycloak.localhost:8082/realms/AppUser/protocol/openid-connect/token" \
     -H "Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded" \
     -d "client_id=app-user-validator" \
     -d "client_secret=6m12QyyGl81d9nABWQXMycZdXho6ejEX" \
     -d "grant_type=client_credentials" \
     -d "scope=openid" | jq -r .access_token)

```
